lex.bot.intentclosingsetting.CfnAbout: Provides a statement the Amazon Lex conveys to the user when the intent is successfully fulfilled.

lex.bot.intentclosingsetting.ClosingResp.Description: The response that Amazon Lex sends to the user when the intent is complete.

lex.bot.intentclosingsetting.IsActive.Description: Specifies whether an intent's closing response is used. When this field is false, the closing response isn't sent to the user and no closing input from the user is used. If the IsActive field isn't specified, the default is true.
